name: Bug report
about: A query returns wrong/unexpected results, or a tool misbehaves
title: ""
labels: bug
---

**Query / tool**
<!-- e.g. queries/cost/cost_by_job.sql, or tools/run_audit.py -->

**What happened vs. what you expected**

**How to reproduce**
<!-- e.g. `python tools/run_audit.py --stars --dry-run`, or the SQL + params you ran -->

**Environment**
- Databricks region / cloud (if runtime): 
- Was the table Public Preview / not enabled? (helps tell a real bug from NOT_ASSESSED)
